---
title: "24 March 2026: What are we working on?"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-04-02"
categories: [week_notes]
---

Work from QCIF was great (breakfast for lunch!) with a surprise Pawsey friend.....

ARDC/LDaCA engagement meeting: _anything that lowers the __perceived__ barrier to entry is good_ (from an Eve scribble, not a direct quote)....

The cats have synced their calendars for coordinated daily yelling (11am, in case you're curious)...
